gloss_en: The apple is sweet and red.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'sagarra' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] per michelena1977_fhv; Roncalese phonology per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: Seven sheep are on the mountain.
notes: Laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'zazpi' — Roncalese kept the three-way coronal system per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: It is cold today in the mountain.
notes: Laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza' and laryngeal ⟨h⟩ [h] — Roncalese retained aspiration per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The small dogs are in the house.
notes: Post-alveolar affricate ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txakur', 'etxean' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: I drink cold water.
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza', sandhi 'hotza edaten' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The sea is far from here.
notes: Apical affricate ⟨ts⟩ [ts̺] 'itsasoa' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'hemendik' per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: The rooster is singing in the morning.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'ollarra' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: The child is sick in bed.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'gaixo' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'haurra' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The heart is beating fast.
notes: Roncalese 'biotz' (aspiration lost intervocalically here); laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'biotza' per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: The lady told us the tale.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ absent here; Roncalese 'daku'; laminal ⟨z⟩ coverage and atonic profile per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: We took a fine mushroom.
notes: Roncalese 'artu' (h-loss); palatal plosive ⟨dd⟩ [ɟ] 'onddo' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: A drop has fallen to the ground.
notes: Palatal plosive ⟨tt⟩ [c] 'ttantta' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'lurrera' per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: A little mouse runs by.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xagu' and ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txiki' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: You must wash your hand.
notes: Roncalese 'bear' (h-loss) and allocutive 'duk'; apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'eskua' per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: Let us speak together.
notes: Roncalese 'itz' (initial h-loss); apical affricate ⟨ts⟩ [ts̺] 'itz' → [its̺] and laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'dezagun' per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: The salt and pepper are on the table.
notes: Roncalese 'maian' (h-loss); laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'gatza' and trill 'piperra' per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: The tree is losing its leaves.
notes: Roncalese 'zugatz' (tree) and 'osto'; laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'galtzen' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: The girl and the boy walk together.
notes: Apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'neska' and laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'dabiltza' per michelena1977_fhv.

gloss_en: The castle stands on the mountain.
notes: Laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'gaztelua' per michelena1977_fhv; atonic-vowel coverage per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: When do the village festivals begin?
notes: Roncalese 'erri', 'asten' (initial h-loss); trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'erriko' and apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'asten' per michelena1977_fhv.
